title: Junior SEO Specialist at Fabindia Online

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Fabindia Online
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fabindia Online! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!
